case_title: HOLLY BAXTER et al VS. WILSON & KRATZER MORTUARIES DBA GREER FAMILY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-23-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-09-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-18-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR VENUE CHANGED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 301, FOR ORDER TRANSFERRING ACTION AND FOR SANCTIONS. MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING -- DEFENDANT WILSON & KRATZER MORTUARIES DBA GREER FAMILY'S MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY IS GRANTED. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS DENIED. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855
